children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, a State that has an application approved by the Secretary under shall be entitled to a payment under this section for each fiscal year in an amount equal to its allotment under for such fiscal year.section 9858c(d) of this titlesection 9858m of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the Secretary may make payments to a State in installments, and in advance or by way of reimbursement, with necessary adjustments on account of overpayments or underpayments, as the Secretary may determine.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: The Secretary may not make such payments in a manner that prevents the State from complying with the requirement specified in .section 9858c(c)(3) of this title

children.heading: Spending of funds by State
children.label: c Spending of funds by State
children.text: Payments to a State from the allotment under for any fiscal year may be obligated by the State in that fiscal year or in the succeeding fiscal year.section 9858m of this title
